---
id: set-recipe
title: "Set curve recipe"
description: "Replaces the active recipe for the named index. The previous active recipe is deactivated."
sidebar_label: "Set curve recipe"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Set curve recipe"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/curves/{indexName}/recipe"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Replaces the active recipe for the named index. The previous active recipe is deactivated.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
